response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with ~13 years of experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies required for a Principal/IC6 role focused on experimentation platforms: no A/B testing frameworks, no feature flag systems, no telemetry/metrics infrastructure, no statistical analysis work, and no track record of building platform-level systems consumed by multiple teams. The engineering depth is solid for senior product work, but lacks the scale, platform-building, and experimentation-specific signal expected at IC6.
strengths: 13+ years of engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent)
Low-latency, high-throughput experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Strong engineering craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, OSS founder)
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-automation experience anywhere on the resume
No evidence of platform/infrastructure work used across multiple teams — title is Senior, not Staff/Principal trajectory
No demonstrated data science, statistical analysis, or metrics/telemetry platform work required for the role
